{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232057182B43B522CEA12DD087BC"}"},"total":8071},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7272098337410302735","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的特别精彩，我都有点怀疑作者是不是犯罪分子了[尬笑]脑洞真的是特别大，特别过瘾，期待能拍什么电视剧这些吧[笑]加油加油加油[赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1693168093,"group_id":"7254152548817308731","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"做一个不一样的自己🤟🤟🤟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwIUdmXjcHeIWFxM8cnk87noqvR6Skx7gsAEoKE1EUky","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3029901265344926","user_name":"心灵^0^鸡汤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3029901265344926","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254152548817308731","book_info":{"abstract":"【刑侦+犯罪+无敌+全能+硬核破案】
 能制造完美案件的凶手，定也是最强的王牌侦探。
 刚考上警校的苏铭，意外获得了睡梦中模拟犯罪的能力。
 每当模拟完美犯罪，无人在追诉期内找出凶手，便可获得在犯罪中所使用的各种技能。
 模拟完美犯罪十万次，获得无数技能。
 本应成为头号罪犯的苏铭，毕业后转身加入刑侦大队。
 所有案件在其眼中，如同小儿科般错漏百出，一个简单的细节漏洞都能直指罪犯！
 随着接连破获众人眼中的完美犯罪和多年悬案，全国惊呼苏铭为真正的王牌侦探。
 一等功胸前都挂不上，警衔短时间内五连跳。
 当罪犯？不可能的！
 不如当个刑警轻松破案，功成名就！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/48d24307b45cf0abc90dfc00e9ec2cc2","author":"初秋微寒","author_id":"","book_id":"7254152548817308731","book_name":"犯罪天赋拉满，你转头加入刑侦队","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7254152612500079161","read_count":"138686","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1407742"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"628","tags":"悬疑灵异,推理,无敌,破案,全能,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a5b79d43c2f406687c65509d590042d6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454638&x-signature=ebnXXcPbeHD56ak9Pa%2BcwSiHW1c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110912064529","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.6087587e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232057182B43B522CEA12DD087BC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1027,"forwarded_coun
